flashcards.back:
Logical: Generated by CPU (virtual)
Physical: Actual memory location

MMU translates logical → physical

First: First hole that fits (fast)
Best: Smallest hole (least waste)
Worst: Largest hole (bad)

First Fit usually preferred

Wasted space INSIDE partition

Cause: Fixed partition > process size
Example: 10KB partition, 8KB process = 2KB wasted

Scattered free blocks OUTSIDE

Cause: Variable partitions
Solution: Compaction or Paging
